retrospective.harder_than_needed: The swap of pairingAck.ts's Step 9 admission call from rememberContact to the new rememberPendingContact required rewiring pairingAck.test.ts's vi.mock('@/src/lib/contacts', ...) factory and renaming its tracked-calls array across roughly a dozen existing assertions spanning unrelated AC blocks (nonce admissibility, sender-mismatch, content-shape rejection) that had nothing to do with pending-confirmation semantics but all asserted against the same mocked admission call. This was mechanical but required touching a large, security-critical 1260+-line test file end to end rather than a localized diff. Separately, the full-suite Regression Prevention pass surfaced one previously-passing test (app/tests/unit/contacts-mutation-gaps.test.ts) breaking on an exact-shape toEqual fixture because of the new additive pendingConfirmationSince field — that file was not listed in this story's stories.json scope.includes (only contacts.test.ts, contacts-selectable.test.ts, contacts-add-by-npub.test.ts, and pairingAck.test.ts were). Fixed with a one-line, clearly-commented fixture addition since it is a direct, unavoidable consequence of the in-scope normalizeStoredContact change (AC-STRUCT-1/2), not a scope expansion into unrelated behavior — flagged here rather than silently absorbed.
